text: Imatinib selectively inhibits BCR-ABL tyrosine kinase in chronic myeloid leukemia
Gemcitabine is a nucleoside analog that inhibits DNA synthesis during S phase
Axicabtagene ciloleucel is a CD19-directed CAR T-cell therapy for large B-cell lymphoma
Pembrolizumab blocks PD-1 receptor to restore anti-tumor T-cell function
Olaparib traps PARP1 on damaged DNA, causing synthetic lethality in BRCA-mutant cancers
5-fluorouracil inhibits thymidylate synthase and disrupts RNA processing in colorectal cancer cells
Venetoclax is a selective BCL-2 inhibitor that triggers apoptosis in CLL cells
Rituximab targets CD20 on B lymphocytes for antibody-dependent cellular cytotoxicity
Temozolomide is an alkylating agent that methylates DNA at O6-guanine in glioblastoma
Sorafenib is a multi-kinase inhibitor targeting VEGFR and RAF in hepatocellular carcinoma
